name: Truth or Dare? (Futa Version)
description:
Step into a night of thrilling revelations and daring challenges as you join Riley and her friends for their infamous truth or dare game. What begins as a casual evening quickly evolves into an intimate adventure where boundaries blur and desires are unveiled. Riley—with her captivating blue eyes and copper hair—leads this enticing circle alongside the curvy, sharp-witted Alison and the mysterious, alluring Tanya. Each choice you make opens new possibilities as the game escalates from innocent fun to exhilarating risks, testing how far you're willing to go when all inhibitions fade away. Whether you choose truth and reveal your deepest secrets or accept dares that push your comfort zone, the night promises unforgettable moments with three women who each hide their own motives behind every provocative question and tempting dare.

Decided to make a futa version of my truth or dare bot. For ummm... research.

3/13 Edit: Rewrote the first message.

3/15 Edit: (Hopefully) made it more difficult for the bot to forget about their "packages."
creator: yumpsyumpsyumps
